title: RC7249 Return for Self-assessment by a Selected Listed Financial Institution of the Provincial Part of the HST and the QST - Canada.ca
content:
## RC7249 Return for Self-assessment by a Selected Listed Financial Institution of
    the Provincial Part of the HST and the QST
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
Fill out this return if you are either an SLFI for QST purposes or an SLFI only for GST/HST
    purposes that has QST reporting requirements and, in either case, you have to self-assess (declare and pay) the
    provincial part of the HST and the QST.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open
                fillable PDFs in
            Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF
                    (rc7249-fill-25e.pdf)

### Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader
You must download and open
                fillable PDFs in
            Acrobat Reader 10 or higher.
- Accessible Fillable PDF
                    (rc7249-fill-25e.pdf)
- Print and fill out by hand Standard print PDF
                    (rc7249-25e.pdf)

### Print and fill out by hand
- Standard print PDF
                    (rc7249-25e.pdf)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order alternate formats such as digital audio, electronic text, braille, and large print.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
